blockingIssues.description: VAL-NEWTYPE-014 failing: 824 matches for raw Uuid in domain fields across 85 files. Expected 0 matches.
SessionId migration incomplete: 71 'session_id: Uuid' matches remain. Acceptance criterion requires 0 matches.
Verification gap: worker did not run the required grep verification before marking feature complete. Only 'cargo test --workspace' was run, not the 'rg' grep specified in verificationSteps.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add enforcement that acceptance criteria greps MUST be run and show 0 (or documented acceptable) matches before marking a migration feature complete. The current rust skill procedure allows marking complete without running verification greps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: refactor-03-final-verification marked complete with only cargo test run; grep verification (VAL-NEWTYPE-014) was never executed by the worker. session_id: Uuid has 71 matches remaining.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For migration features with acceptance criteria expressed as grep commands (e.g., 'rg X → 0'), require showing the actual grep output with 0 matches as part of the completion evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature acceptance criteria 'rg session_id: Uuid → 0' was not verified. Worker marked complete with 71 matches still present.

VAL-NEWTYPE-002.evidence: Re-exported at crate root via pub use ids::*
